title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0114 87 Queenshill Road, Bristol, BS4 2XQ
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Paul Rhodes  Site address:  87 Queenshill Road, Bristol, BS4 2XQ  Description of proposed development:  Erection of a detached bungalow in rear garden  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 4 August 2025   Date by when representations must be made 9 September 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 9 October 2025   Decision date 7 October 2025     Decision    S62A/2025/0114 Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 246 KB, 8 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 9 September 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0114 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Existing Site Plan - 2b3p bungalow 87 Queenshill  (PDF, 40.8 KB, 1 page)  Proposed Elevations - 2B3P Bungalow - 87 Queenshill Rd  (PDF, 107 KB, 1 page)  Proposed Floorplan - 2B3P Bungalow - 87 Queenshill Rd  (PDF, 20.3 KB, 1 page)  Proposed Site Plan - 2B3P Bungalow - 87 Queenshill Rd  (PDF, 46.9 KB, 1 page)  24149-PL07-Site Location Plan  (PDF, 190 KB, 1 page)  250717 S62A cover letter PR002485 FINAL  (PDF, 530 KB, 9 pages)  BNG exemption form  (PDF, 1.26 MB, 3 pages)  Cil questions  (PDF, 3.48 MB, 6 pages)  Completed application form  (PDF, 1.25 MB, 14 pages)  Energy Statement  (PDF, 1.21 MB, 8 pages)  Existing & Proposed Street Scene - 2B3P Bungalow - 87 Queenshill Rd  (PDF, 166 KB, 1 page)   Questionnaire and supporting documents   BCS21 - Quality Urban Design...
